global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on the main message and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their finances with ClearLedger.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A semi-transparent circular shape in the center of the ad, blending with the background color.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A semi-transparent rectangular shape overlapping the circular shape, also centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, modern font displaying the text 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind' in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A simple, rectangular logo at the top of the ad with the text 'ClearLedger' in a clean font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Book now' in a prominent font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with soft colors, ClearLedger, Track every euro.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Track every euro Built for peace of mind, ClearLedger, Book now
